description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:stretch Docker image and a before_script that runs apt update -qq and installs libc-dev gcc make autoconf automake libncurses-dev gnutls-dev in non‑interactive mode. Define a single stage named test. Add a test job that runs in the test stage and executes ./autogen.sh autoconf, then ./configure --without-makeinfo, and finally make check. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are needed.
